sourceMovie.title: Broker
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Broker for the same reason it broke through in 2022: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Hirokazu Kore-eda keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Life As We Know It
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Broker clicked for you, Life As We Know It (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Broker?
faq.answer: Try Life As We Know It, Instant Family, Kiss the Girls—each shares DNA with Broker while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Broker?
faq.answer: Broker (2022) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Broker worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
